title: Galeries Lafayette Gift Card
description: Which products, services, and locations accept a Galeries Lafayette e‑gift card, and what are its usage limits and exclusions?
narrative: The user wants comprehensive details about how a Galeries Lafayette e‑gift card can be used, including whether it works online and in physical stores, the product categories it covers or excludes (e.g., catering, listed services), its one‑year validity, the maximum cumulative balance (up to €1,000), and other conditions such as non‑transferability and non‑refundability. Documents that mention these specific rules and restrictions are considered relevant.

title: Traditional Lamb Tagine
description: What is an authentic Moroccan lamb tagine recipe that uses traditional spices and cooking methods?
narrative: The user is looking for a detailed, authentic Moroccan lamb tagine preparation guide. Relevant documents should provide a step‑by‑step recipe that includes classic ingredients such as lamb, saffron, cumin, cinnamon, preserved lemons, olives, coriander, mint, and vegetables typical of the dish. The instructions should cover the appropriate cooking technique (e.g., sautéing the meat and onions, layering vegetables, and slow‑cooking in a tagine or covered pot), cooking times, temperature settings, and tips for achieving the characteristic flavor and tenderness. Variations that remain faithful to traditional North‑African flavors and any serving suggestions (e.g., garnish with almonds, pairing with wine) are also considered relevant.

title: Used Car Search
description: How can I locate reliable used‑car listings in France that fit a budget of €10,000‑€15,000, have under 80,000 km, and include a verifiable history report?
narrative: The user wants to purchase a second‑hand vehicle and is looking for online advertisements that satisfy several constraints: price between €10,000 and €15,000, mileage not exceeding 80,000 km, fuel type unspecified, and an available vehicle‑history check (e.g., Histovec). Relevant documents should describe how to perform detailed searches on French car‑sale portals, explain the use of filters (price, mileage, make/model), and provide guidance on verifying the car’s provenance to avoid scams. Documents that only list generic advertising features without addressing these specific criteria are not relevant.

title: Veal Paupiettes Variations
description: What are the different preparation methods and ingredient substitutions for veal paupiettes, especially when using mushrooms, onions, and a creamy or broth‑based sauce?
narrative: The user is seeking detailed veal paupiette recipes that include variations such as adding Paris mushrooms, onions, different broths (beef, poultry) or white wine, optional cream, and herbs. Relevant documents should provide step‑by‑step cooking instructions, cooking times, and suggestions for ingredient swaps or flavor enhancements, as well as user comments describing successful adjustments.

title: Car Sun Protection
description: What are the most effective and legally compliant methods to protect a vehicle’s interior and occupants from solar UV and heat?
narrative: The user is looking for comprehensive information on ways to shield a car from sunlight, including products (e.g., interior sun visors, rear‑window visors, electrostatic films, self‑tinted solar film kits), their installation methods, dimensions, and performance characteristics such as UV blockage and heat reduction. Relevant material must also cover legal requirements (e.g., minimum visible‑light transmission for front windows), safety considerations, and comparative benefits (privacy, visibility, ease of use). Documents describing the types of visors, film transparency options, benefits, and maintenance tips for cars parked outdoors are all considered relevant.

title: Petit Bateau T-shirts
description: What styles, colors, sleeve lengths, and materials are offered in the women's T‑shirt collection from Petit Bateau?
narrative: The user is seeking comprehensive information about the range of women's T‑shirts sold by Petit Bateau, including different cuts (short‑sleeve, long‑sleeve), color options, prints, and fabric descriptions. Relevant documents are those that describe the brand's women's clothing line, especially sections that detail T‑shirt variations, related collections, and any accompanying product details.

title: Renault Discount Options
description: What discounts, lease‑with‑purchase terms, and financing conditions are available for new Renault vehicles through Elite Auto compared to standard dealer or employee pricing?
narrative: The user is looking for detailed information on the price reductions (e.g., up to 42.5% discount), lease‑with‑purchase (LOA) structures, insurance costs, and eligibility criteria offered by Elite Auto for new Renault models, and how these compare to regular dealer or Renault employee offers. Relevant documents must mention specific discount percentages, monthly rental amounts, purchase options, insurance add‑ons, and any guarantees or service conditions.

title: War School e‑book purchase
description: What are the steps and requirements for buying and downloading an e‑book from the School of War website?
narrative: The user wants a complete guide to acquiring an e‑book from the School of War (École de Guerre) online store. Relevant information includes how to create an account, select a title, choose between epub2, mobi, or azw3 formats, receive the three download links, use compatible software (e.g., Calibre), understand payment options (credit card via Société Générale, bank transfer), know the order processing and delivery timeline, and be aware of any legal notices or cookie policies that may affect the transaction. Documents describing the ordering workflow, file formats, payment security, and cookie usage are considered relevant.

title: Reloadable Rights Eligibility
description: What specific conditions must be met to qualify for a reloading of Pôle Emploi unemployment benefits after returning to work?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive explanation of the eligibility criteria for Pôle Emploi’s reloadable (rechargement) unemployment rights. Relevant documents must describe the required amount of work (e.g., 910 hours/130 days or alternative thresholds based on the reform date), the nature of the previous job loss (involuntary or legitimate resignation), the expiration/lapse period (three‑year limit plus the original compensation period), acceptable contract types, and any special provisions such as the right of option or the Special Solidarity Allowance. Documents that detail these quantitative thresholds, time limits, and procedural steps (including proof of activity and advisor notification) are considered relevant, while unrelated general unemployment information is not.

title: AXA Client Login
description: What are the correct steps to log into the AXA insurance client area and recover a forgotten password?
narrative: The user wants practical guidance for accessing their AXA insurance online portal, including the official login URL (https://client.axa.fr/), how to verify the site’s security (HTTPS and correct domain), and the procedure for recovering a lost password via the 'Forgot your password' link. Relevant documents must describe the distinction between the AXA insurance client space and the separate AXA Bank portal, provide contact options if password recovery fails, and mention common login problems such as caps lock or keyboard issues. Only sources that detail these login and password‑reset steps for the AXA insurance client area are considered relevant.

title: EV Purchase Costs
description: What are the list prices, available government incentives, and net cost for electric passenger cars in France in 2021?
narrative: The user wants comprehensive information to determine the effective purchase price of electric vehicles in France. title: Downy Mildew Tomato Consumption
description: Is it safe to eat tomatoes that have been infected with downy mildew, and what precautions should be taken when using, storing, or canning them?
narrative: The user wants authoritative information on the health risks (if any) of consuming tomatoes affected by downy mildew, including whether the disease poses a food‑safety hazard, how the disease might affect taste or pH, and recommended actions such as cutting off lesions, avoiding canning, or specific storage guidelines. Relevant documents must discuss safety assessments, expert opinions, and practical advice for handling infected tomatoes.

title: Three Days Darkness
description: What are the origins, variations, and contemporary interpretations of the prophetic 'three days of darkness' in new‑age and religious texts?
narrative: The user wants sources that explain the prophecy of a three‑day period of total darkness, covering its historical roots (e.g., Monique Mathieu, Padre Pio, Hopi, Nibiru), the alleged causes (pole shift, celestial object, veil of darkness), and how modern new‑age communities connect it to current planetary or spiritual transformations; relevant documents must discuss the prediction itself, any suggested timeline, and its broader cosmological or spiritual significance.

title: Spaceballs streaming
description: Where can I legally watch the film La Folle Histoire de l'Espace (Spaceballs) online?
narrative: The user is seeking legitimate, subscription‑based or free‑with‑ads platforms that provide the full movie La Folle Histoire de l'Espace, preferably in French or with French subtitles. title: Legends Office Streaming
description: Where can I legally stream all seasons of Le Bureau des Légendes (The Legends Office) in French (VF) and with VOSTFR subtitles?

title: Prevail Usage
description: What are the various meanings, conjugations, and historical usages of the verb “prevail” in French and English?
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive information about the verb “prevail,” including its grammatical conjugation patterns, semantic senses (e.g., to dominate, to exist, to be common), etymology, and examples of literary or historical usage in both French and English texts. Relevant documents should describe the verb’s forms (present, past, conditional, subjunctive, infinitive), illustrate its usage in literary quotations, explain its evolution from Latin *praevalere*, and distinguish between the transitive/intransitive uses and related idiomatic expressions. Only sources that address any of these aspects of “prevail” are considered relevant.

title: African Episodes
description: Which episodes of the French TV series “Rendez‑vous en terre inconnu” feature a celebrity traveling to an African country to meet local indigenous peoples?
narrative: The user wants a compiled list of episodes that satisfy three criteria: (1) the episode is part of the “Rendez‑vous en terre inconnu” series, (2) the destination is an African nation, and (3) the celebrity guest meets or interacts with a specific indigenous or remote community there. Relevant information includes the episode number, year, guest name, African country, and the name of the indigenous group or community featured. Episodes that do not meet all three conditions are not relevant.

title: Truffle Potato Diarrhea
description: Is the frozen Black Truffle Potato Crush appropriate to eat while recovering from diarrhea?
narrative: The user wants to determine whether the Black Truffle Potato Crush product complies with dietary recommendations for managing diarrhea, such as low‑fiber, low‑fat, and easily digestible foods. A document is considered relevant if it provides details on the product's composition, cooking method, or health guidance that helps assess its suitability for a diarrheal diet.

title: Paris Large Venue
description: What large event spaces in Paris can I rent that offer around 3000 m², have hosted hundreds of events, and attract a high number of visitors?
narrative: The user seeks a venue in Paris suitable for sizable events, focusing on size (≈3000 m²), proven experience (≈300 events hosted), visitor traffic (≈200,000 visitors), and rental contact information. Relevant documents should describe the venue’s dimensions, event history, visitor numbers, and provide rental details.

title: Green Electricity Comparison
description: What are the differences in price, contract flexibility, and renewable energy content among the residential electricity offers from Alpiq, E.Leclerc Energies, and Urban Solar Energy?
narrative: The user wants to evaluate and compare the three providers' residential plans, focusing on the advertised kWh price (including any subscriptions or fees), the presence of non‑binding or commitment‑free contracts, the share of renewable energy (e.g., green guarantees, solar or hydraulic sources), any hidden or surprise charges, and the availability of tools (mobile apps, Linky integration) for managing consumption. title: Kia EV6 Pricing
description: What is the current price of the Kia EV6 in France, including base price, bonuses, and any recent price adjustments?
narrative: The user seeks up‑to‑date pricing information for the Kia EV6 sold in France. Relevant documents must state the official base price (e.g., €47,990 for the rear‑wheel‑drive version and €48,690 after the noted €700 increase), the all‑wheel‑drive price (€51,990), as well as any applicable ecological bonuses or incentives. Information about price differences between standard and GT trims is also relevant. Documents that only discuss specifications without price data are not relevant.

title: Gaulish Ancestry
description: Did the ancestors of modern French people come from the ancient Gauls, and what evidence supports or refutes this claim?
narrative: The user seeks a nuanced answer about the biological and cultural continuity between the Celtic‑speaking peoples of pre‑Roman Gaul and today’s French population. Relevant documents should discuss Julius Caesar’s classification of the Gauls, the archaeological record of the La Tène culture, the evolution of Gaul into Gallo‑Roman society, and the later historiographic construction of the ‘Gaulish ancestor’ myth in French education and nationalism. Sources that present scholarly consensus on genetic, linguistic, and archaeological continuity, as well as those that highlight the role of later migrations (Franks, Vikings, immigration) and the politicisation of the Gaul identity, are considered relevant. Irrelevant material includes only generic descriptions of Gaul without reference to ancestry or modern French identity.

title: Cheap Faro Car Rental

title: Resistant Potato Varieties

A document is considered relevant if it provides information on disease resistance of a variety, includes comparative data or recommendations, and is focused on potatoes rather than general pest control methods.

title: Ombudsman Complaint Process
description: What steps must a visually‑impaired consumer follow to lodge a dispute about a high electricity bill with the French National Energy Ombudsman?
narrative: The user wants a clear, step‑by‑step guide for filing a complaint with the National Energy Ombudsman, including prerequisite contact with the supplier, required written request, timelines, and how to use the dedicated free phone service for visually‑impaired persons. title: Desktop PC Deals

narrative: The user wants to locate desktop computer listings on the Darty website that meet specific hardware specifications (minimum 16 GB RAM and SSD storage), are part of the promotional bundle offering an immediate €40 discount when purchased together with Microsoft 365 Family, and are available with free shipping or free in‑store withdrawal. title: Silver Printing Processes
description: What were the major historical silver photographic printing processes and what are their distinguishing chemical and technical characteristics?
narrative: The user is looking for a comprehensive overview of silver-based photographic printing methods, covering the evolution from early techniques such as calotype, salted paper, and daguerreotype through wet and dry collodion, albumen, silver gelatin, and later silver bromide processes. Relevant documents should describe each process’s chemical composition (e.g., use of silver halides, albumin, gelatin), preparation steps, exposure requirements, and historical milestones. Materials that focus on modern digital software only, unless they directly emulate these historic silver processes, are not relevant.

title: Leek Quiche Instructions
description: What are the ingredients, quantities, preparation steps, cooking parameters, and possible variations (e.g., with lardons, alternative cheeses, or crust‑less options) for making a leek quiche?
narrative: The user is seeking a complete, step‑by‑step recipe for a leek quiche. title: Kid-friendly Car Games

title: Oil Lamp Wick Selection

title: Boiled Potato Skin Effects
description: Does peeling potatoes before boiling affect water absorption and nutrient loss compared to cooking them with the skin?
narrative: The user is looking for authoritative evidence on how peeling potatoes prior to boiling influences water uptake, weight change, and nutrient leaching. title: Back-to-Work Bonus Eligibility
description: What are the current eligibility criteria and application procedures for the French back‑to‑work (employment) bonus and APRE assistance for RSA/SSA beneficiaries?
narrative: The user wants up‑to‑date information on who can receive the French employment bonus or personalized back‑to‑work assistance, including required employment duration, income ceilings, family situation, and the steps to claim it via tax returns or departmental agencies.
